_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in remote command line and Graphic User Interface (GUI) tool usage.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing shell scripts to automate data operations, including file manipulation, job scheduling, environment configuration, log processing, and pipeline orchestration on Linux systems.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.465), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.436).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [command, graphic, gui, interface, line, remote] vs WIDAI-only terms [automate, configuration, data, environment, file, job] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.865, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.3%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in remote command line and Graphic User Interface (GUI) tool usage." and "Skill in writing shell scripts to automate data operations, including file manip". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 > STS 0.428 (gap +0.072). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [command, graphic, gui, interface, line, remote]. WIDAI-only: [automate, configuration, data, environment, file, job].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.3% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
